flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Olympic College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.3k vs 4.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Olympic College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Olympic College fell 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.2k → $12.0k).
